creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 177122
alarm-clock-applet.shar

Hi ILUXA,

I made some changes to the port to make portlint happy and so that it builds in Poudriere.  LIB_DEPENDS could be trimmed a lot by using the appropriate USE_* flags.  I hope that's all ok with you.

With this: poudriere testport FreeBSD 10.3/amd64 ok, portlint ok
